trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo's 2025 laboratory and consumer tests highlight Tre Marie as the top pandoro and Conad as the best value, providing fresh evidence from December 2025.
